caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold watch sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm and wears over-ear headphones. To his left is a white banner featuring a star logo and the repeated text "UNION MUSTLE". In the background, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table in front of him is a black mug with "THE TALK OUT" printed on it. Across the frames, the man is speaking and gesturing; he begins with his arms crossed, then shifts to clasping his hands together while continuing to talk. Small logos are visible in the lower corners of the scene, including one that reads "THE TALK OUT". The setting remains static as the man engages in conversation.
